name: asynchronia
description: Project-specific automatic routing, mandatory model preflight, scope checks, and evidence workflows for every Codex task in the Asynchronia repository.

interface.shortDescription: Automatically route every task through model and scope preflight.
interface.longDescription: Provides PLUGIN_AUTO_ROUTING: REQUIRED, MODEL_PREFLIGHT_PAUSE: REQUIRED, blocking model selection with same-thread CONTINUE, repository skill fallback under plugins/asynchronia/skills/, scope isolation, smoke orchestration, deployment verification, acceptance gating, and validation rules for Asynchronia changes.
defaultPrompt: repository skill source under `plugins/asynchronia/skills/` as the mandatory fallback
Automatically route this Asynchronia task and run the mandatory plugin preflight before any edits.
Use the repository skill source under plugins/asynchronia/skills/ as the mandatory fallback if needed.
Recommend the cheapest reliable model and reasoning level, pause, and wait for same-thread CONTINUE.
Run task-router, scope-isolation-check, and model-selector before implementation.
Validate that no implementation starts before the mandatory CONTINUE resume token.
